EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriGeometryType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

The available kinds of geometry objects.

[Guid("1B07791D-38C5-11D0-92D2-00805F7C28B0")]
public enum esriGeometryType

Fields

esriGeometryAny = 7

7: Any of the geometry coclass types.

esriGeometryBag = 17

17: A collection of geometries of arbitrary type.

esriGeometryBezier3Curve = 15

15: A third degree bezier curve (four control points).

esriGeometryCircularArc = 14

14: A portion of the boundary of a circle.

esriGeometryEllipticArc = 16

16: A portion of the boundary of an ellipse.

esriGeometryEnvelope = 5

5: A rectangle indicating the spatial extent of another geometry.

esriGeometryLine = 13

13: A straight line segment between two points.

esriGeometryMultiPatch = 9

9: A collection of surface patches.

esriGeometryMultipoint = 2

2: An ordered collection of points.

esriGeometryNull = 0

0: A geometry of unknown type.

esriGeometryPath = 6

6: A connected sequence of segments.

esriGeometryPoint = 1

1: A single zero dimensional geometry.

esriGeometryPolygon = 4

4: A collection of rings ordered by their containment relationship.

esriGeometryPolyline = 3

3: An ordered collection of paths.

esriGeometryRay = 20

20: An infinite, one-directional line extending from an origin point.

esriGeometryRing = 11

11: An area bounded by one closed path.

esriGeometrySphere = 21

21: A complete 3 dimensional sphere.

esriGeometryTriangleFan = 19

19: A surface patch of triangles defined by the first point and two consecutive points.

esriGeometryTriangleStrip = 18

18: A surface patch of triangles defined by three consecutive points.

esriGeometryTriangles = 22

22: A surface patch of triangles defined by non-overlapping sets of three consecutive points each.
